name: Kid-Tuber
white: An unboxing video of another unboxing video.
A twenty-minute video about a ten-second thing.
Ending family dinner with "smash that like button."
The little sister who narrates her own life like a streamer.
An epic-fail compilation starring Dad.
The slime tutorial that ended carpet privileges forever.
A back-to-school haul video of three pencils and an eraser.
Filming my reaction to my own reaction video.
Filming the entire school play vertically.
A day-in-the-life vlog of the class hamster.
A ring light at the breakfast table.
Whispering "don't forget to subscribe" during the quiet part of church.
Apologizing to my subscribers, both of them.
An intro sequence longer than the actual video.
A lunchbox video titled "YOU WON'T BELIEVE WHAT'S INSIDE."
Practicing my surprised-thumbnail face in the mirror.
The tenth take of walking casually through a door.
Mom wandering into the background of the livestream with a laundry basket.
A collab video with my imaginary friend.
The "first!" comment, posted by Dad.
A whisper video of somebody very slowly eating one pickle.
A prank channel where every prank is just doing chores.
Streaming my homework live to zero viewers.
A famous kid-tuber's mansion tour of his bunk bed.
Editing out the part where I cried.
A challenge video where the challenge is eating one vegetable.
A video of our cat sneezing with one million views.
A get-ready-with-me video for picture day.
A slow-motion montage of me falling off my bike, set to sad piano.
A podcast hosted by me and my stuffed animals.

black.text: In today's video, my little brother reacts to _ for the first time.
Mom said no more filming in the house after the incident with _.
The thumbnail promised _. The video did not deliver.
Today's tutorial: how to make _ at home.
My channel got taken down for a week because of _.
You can skip this ad for _ in five... four... three...
My channel used to be about _, but everyone really just watches it for _.
